---
title: "Database Systems and Data Architecture Review"
subtitle: "Systems, Schemas, Workloads, Governance, Lineage, Recovery, Lifecycle, and Architecture Readiness"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## Architecture objective

Define how database systems, schemas, storage models, integrations, metadata, governance, security, recovery, and analytical consumers fit together.

## Reproducible example

```{python}
systems = [
    {"system": "customer_core", "type": "operational_database", "storage": "relational"},
    {"system": "warehouse_marts", "type": "analytical_database", "storage": "columnar_sql"},
]
print(systems)
```

## Governance review

Check ownership, metadata coverage, lineage, access controls, quality gates, recovery testing, retention status, and certification.

## Appendix

Attach system inventory, schema assets, workloads, governance controls, recovery plans, lineage edges, and architecture risks.
